MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 3, 2008: Michael Sherwood Rossoff, attorney for plaintiff The Tides Center, A Cailifornia Nonprofit Benefit Corporation; Georgetta Snowden, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Robbie Snowden, defendant, in propria persona

Settlement conference is off calendar. The case is settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed this day with the court. The July 7, 2008 trial date is vacated.
